title: Sharded safetensors loader (index.json + multi-file)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

Llama 3 8B ships as model-00001-of-00004.safetensors ... model-00004-of-00004.safetensors plus model.safetensors.index.json (which maps tensor names -> shard filenames). Current load_safetensors in ferrotorch-serialize/src/safetensors_io.rs is single-file only.

Work:
- Add load_safetensors_sharded(index_path: &Path) -> StateDict<T>: parse the JSON index (fields: metadata.total_size, weight_map: HashMap<String, String>), group keys by shard, load each shard once, assemble into a single StateDict.
- Also: load_safetensors_auto(path) that detects whether it was given a .safetensors file or an index.json and dispatches.
- Memory-map shards if possible (safetensors::SafeTensors::deserialize on mmap) to avoid copying every byte through user RAM for a ~16GB model.
- Preserve existing bf16 -> f32 upcast path across all shards.

Acceptance:
- Test fixture: two small fake shards + an index.json in tests/fixtures/. load_safetensors_sharded returns a StateDict with the union of their keys, shapes intact.
- Works on a real Llama-3-8B checkpoint (4 shards, ~16GB bf16) without OOM on a 64GB RAM machine.
